race.comment: TAG THE BRIDE (11) is a maiden galloper who resumes after finishing second on debut over 1000m at Pakenham seven months ago. Shows plenty of promise and gets in light after the claim, expected to go close. CACCHIONE (1) went forward last start over 1000m at this track and held on well for second, beaten 1.5 lengths. Will be up on the speed from the low draw and hard to run down. BORIDI (10) presents third up having made nice improvement last start at Pakenham Synthetic to grab second. He can improve again and will take holding out. SONIC BOLT (4) is on debut. By Capitalist and comes from the Brent Stanley stable. He looked handy winning a recent jumpout here and can figure.
